creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Tempo,
 
 Thanks for writing this report. Did you check on the networking
 mailinglist? (http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-net).
 
 That said, I do not think this is a problem at this point, but we
 first should try to get as much information as possible through
 the help channels and then finally report a problem if needed.
 
 If we all agree this is worth a problem, please get back to me
 so that we can reopen the ticket with all the information that
 is available at that point.
 
 Please do not feel offended, just wanted to make sure you will
 possibly gain more help this way then with the PR ticket.
 
 Best regards,
 Remko
 
 -- 
 Kind regards,
 
       Remko Lodder               ** remko@elvandar.org
       FreeBSD                    ** remko@FreeBSD.org
 
       /* Quis custodiet ipsos custodes */
